raw_response:
Tool Call: retrieve("highest concentration of oxygen nasal cannula vs venturi mask")

Retrieved Documents: 32 documents

Based on the provided information, I would like to add that although all options can deliver significant amounts of oxygen, the Venturi mask offers highly precise and controllable oxygen levels due to its design principles. Specifically, the Venturi mask ensures consistency regardless of inhalation rate because it mixes known volumes of pure oxygen with ambient air according to preset ratios. Furthermore, modern variants offer wide ranges starting from lower flows suitable even for mild cases yet capable of reaching extremely high percentages necessary for severe hypoxic episodes. Therefore, considering precision and adaptability, especially beneficial in scenarios requiring fine tuning of oxygen dosages, my opinion remains aligned towards choosing **\boxed{B}** - Venturi mask over other contenders including nasal cannulas which might fall short regarding stability particularly at higher desired oxygen saturations. Thus maintaining our earlier stance supported now stronger evidence emphasizing control and customization capabilities inherent only in Venturi designs outperforming simpler alternatives here.
